signals.headline: SOUTH KOREA INFLATION RISES TO 2
signals.raw:
SOUTH KOREA INFLATION RISES TO 2.2% IN MARCH 2026, ABOVE BOK TARGET AMID OIL SHOCKS | NO | MED confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in prior months, missing forecasts of 2.4% but exceeding the Bank of Korea's 2.0% target, driven by global energy volatility from Middle East conflicts.[2][4][5]
